nodes.name: login-shell-visual-mobile
nodes.description: Mobile login page screenshot. Shows a Chinese-language login form with email input, password input, login button, forgot password link, and registration link. Language toggle (中/EN) visible at top right. Used for visual regression testing of the login shell on mobile viewport.

nodes.name: preview-dashboard-shell-visual-desktop
nodes.description: Desktop dashboard/notebook list page screenshot (NotebookLM-style UI in Chinese). Shows '我的笔记本' (My Notebooks) with a table listing notebook titles, source counts, creation dates, and owner roles. Top bar has settings, user avatar, search, view toggle, sort dropdown, and '新建' (New) button. Tab navigation: '全部' (All) / '我的笔记本' (My Notebooks). Used for visual regression testing of the dashboard shell on desktop viewport.

nodes.name: workspace-shell-visual-desktop
nodes.description: Desktop workspace/chat page screenshot (Chinese). Three-pane layout: left sidebar shows chat history ('历史会话') with '新对话' button; center pane is the chat area with mode tabs (知识库/Knowledge Base, 检索/Search, 通用/General), empty state prompt, and input box; right sidebar shows document library ('资料库') with upload button, link adder, and research notes ('研究笔记') panel with status/mode/session/citation stats. Used for visual regression testing of the workspace shell on desktop viewport.

nodes.name: workspace-shell-visual-mobile
nodes.description: Mobile workspace/chat page screenshot (Chinese). Simplified single-column layout showing chat area with mode tabs (知识库, 检索, 通用), empty state prompt ('开始一段对话'), and input box at bottom. Header shows back arrow, workspace ID truncated, hamburger menu, and language toggle. Sidebars collapsed. Used for visual regression testing of the workspace shell on mobile viewport.

nodes.name: preview-workspace-shell-visual-desktop
nodes.description: Desktop workspace/chat page screenshot (English, Context-OS branded). Left sidebar shows thread list under 'THREADS' with search and '+ New Thread' button. Center pane shows an active conversation with user question about Project Scope document and AI response with numbered findings. Right sidebar shows 'Sources' panel with 4 checkable documents, and 'Notes' panel with saved notes. Top bar shows 'Context-OS', project name 'Research Project Alpha', and actions: + New Notebook, Analyze, Share, API, settings. Used for visual regression testing of the workspace shell preview on desktop viewport.

nodes.label: settings-appearance-shell-visual-mobile.png
nodes.description: Mobile viewport screenshot of the Settings page showing the Appearance & Language tab. Displays theme mode selection (Follow System, Light, Dark) stacked vertically, and interface language selection (Simplified Chinese, English) stacked vertically. Includes a top navigation bar with tabs (Billing, Profile, Appearance & Language, Security, Notifications) and a logout button. Footer shows current theme and language status. Used for visual regression testing on mobile.

nodes.label: settings-appearance-shell-visual-desktop.png
nodes.description: Desktop viewport screenshot of the Settings page showing the Appearance & Language tab. Theme mode options (Follow System, Light, Dark) are displayed in a horizontal three-column layout. Language options (Simplified Chinese, English) are in a horizontal two-column layout. Same navigation tabs and status footer as mobile but with wider layout. Used for visual regression testing on desktop.

nodes.label: login-shell-visual-desktop.png
nodes.description: Desktop viewport screenshot of the Login page. Centered login card with title '登录' (Login), email input field, password input field, teal submit button, and links for 'Forgot password?' and 'Register'. Language toggle (CN/EN) in top-right corner. Light gradient background. Used for visual regression testing of the authentication page.

nodes.label: saasui-perplexity-chat-page.png
nodes.description: Desktop screenshot from a visual benchmark comparison showing the Perplexity AI chat interface on saasui.design. Displays a split-pane layout with a chat conversation on the left and an information panel on the right. Shows a query 'How to fix a loose screw?' with AI response containing steps (Change, Disassemble, etc.). Includes navigation sidebar, search bar, and footer with site links. Used as a visual benchmark/reference for chat UI design.

nodes.label: perplexity-home-mobile-light.png
nodes.description: Mobile screenshot showing the Perplexity.ai homepage intercepted by a Cloudflare security verification page. Displays 'Performing security verification' message with a CAPTCHA checkbox ('Verify you are human') and Cloudflare branding. This is not the intended Perplexity UI but a bot protection interstitial captured during benchmark testing. Used as a visual benchmark artifact.

properties.description: Perplexity.ai homepage screenshot captured on desktop viewport in light mode. Shows Cloudflare security verification page (bot check) with 'Verify you are human' checkbox, Perplexity logo, and white background. Captured as visual benchmark reference.
properties.benchmark_purpose: Reference Perplexity homepage layout and security gate UX in light mode on desktop

properties.description: SaaS UI design reference showing Perplexity signup page. Top section shows Perplexity homepage with search bar and 'Where knowledge begins' tagline. Bottom section shows account creation form with email input, Google sign-up button, and profile avatar. Captured from saas-design reference site.
properties.benchmark_purpose: Reference Perplexity signup flow and account creation UI patterns

properties.description: SaaS UI design reference showing Perplexity search results page. Top section shows search query 'what is saas ui design' with source cards and answer summary. Bottom section shows full search result with sidebar navigation, related questions, and source citations. Captured from saas-design reference site.
properties.benchmark_purpose: Reference Perplexity search results layout, source citation UI, and answer presentation patterns

properties.description: Perplexity.ai homepage screenshot captured on mobile viewport in dark mode. Shows Cloudflare security verification page (bot check) with 'Verify you are human' checkbox, Perplexity logo, and dark background. Mobile-responsive layout with larger text. Captured as visual benchmark reference.
properties.benchmark_purpose: Reference Perplexity homepage layout and security gate UX in dark mode on mobile

properties.description: Perplexity.ai homepage screenshot captured on desktop viewport in dark mode. Shows Cloudflare security verification page (bot check) with 'Verify you are human' checkbox, Perplexity logo, and dark background. Captured as visual benchmark reference.
properties.benchmark_purpose: Reference Perplexity homepage layout and security gate UX in dark mode on desktop

properties.description: Collection of screenshots used as visual benchmarks for comparing against Perplexity UI patterns, including homepage, signup, and search result pages across different viewports and themes

nodes.label: perplexity_search_desktop_light
nodes.description: Perplexity search page desktop light theme screenshot captured for visual benchmark comparison. Shows the main search interface with search input, suggested topics, and answer display area in light color scheme.

nodes.label: saasui_perplexity_navigation_page
nodes.description: SaaS UI Perplexity navigation page screenshot for visual benchmark. Displays navigation patterns including sidebar menu, top navigation bar, page hierarchy, and content organization layout used as reference for UI/UX design benchmarking.

metadata.reason: Both are mobile viewport screenshots of the same application, showing different authenticated states (login vs workspace).
Both are authenticated desktop pages of the same app ecosystem. Dashboard lists notebooks; workspace is the notebook detail/chat view. Related but distinct page types.
Both are authenticated desktop pages in the same app (notebook list vs notebook workspace). Same top-bar branding pattern.
Same workspace page shown on desktop and mobile viewports — responsive design pair.
Both are desktop workspace/chat pages with similar three-pane layout (chat center, sidebar lists, document sources). Different branding/lang but same functional page type.
Same functional workspace/chat page, different viewport size and language/branding. Core UI elements (chat area, mode tabs, input box) are shared.

links.description: Same settings appearance page captured at different viewports (mobile vs desktop) for responsive visual regression testing
Both are UI screenshots from the avrag-rs application used in visual regression testing, though different pages and viewports
Both are desktop visual regression screenshots from the same application (avrag-rs), part of the e2e visual-ui test suite
Both are desktop UI screenshots used for visual comparison/testing purposes, though from different sources (benchmark vs regression)
Both are visual benchmark screenshots referencing Perplexity AI, captured as part of the same visual benchmark test suite in test-results/visual-benchmark/

properties.reason: Same page (Perplexity homepage security verification), same viewport (desktop), different theme (light vs dark)
Same page (Perplexity homepage security verification), different viewport (desktop vs mobile), different theme (light vs dark)
Both relate to Perplexity homepage/landing experience, though from different sources (direct screenshot vs design reference)
Both from same saas-design reference source, both show Perplexity UI patterns, different pages (signup vs search results)
Same page (Perplexity homepage security verification), same theme (dark), different viewport (desktop vs mobile)
